title: geonoma cuneata subsp. guanacastensis
intro: Geonoma cuneata subsp. guanacastensis, also known as Guanacaste Geonoma, is a type of palm tree native to the tropical regions of Central America, particularly in Costa Rica and Panama. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Guanacaste Geonoma include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immune system booster. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal benefits.
